productDisplayName: Forever New Women's Gold Sleeveless Black Dress
description: CompositionBlack strapless dress with black lining that has shell made of 100% silk, with a contrast panel and lining made of 100% polyester, a concealed zipper closure on the left side, underwired seams, pleated panel on the bodice made of gold tissue fabric and tulle liningFittingRegularWash care Garment must be handled delicately Cold hand wash separately with delicate detergent Wash garment inside out Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Drip dry in shade Cool iron on reverse side Do not dry clean Bring out the vixen in you in this strapless black dress from forever new. The fitted bodice with gold tissue bows flows into a flared skirt infusing this dress with sexy confidence. Team this with metallic heels and a bold golden ring and you are all set to rock the party.Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
